title: Infiniextras
description: Infinicrafts datapack addon. Also adds god items!
body:

[![Requires Infiniresources](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88f9ed70232bb6ba428929e707b8a14da1003bc.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/infiniresources)
![Avaliable as Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26d277c615459d01f3480b77b79f1132d61c0a8.png)

[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ca9a5bb2d57afa6019b34cd08b90b1cfb930ce.png)](https://discord.gg/WBqEXSt9qy)

---

### IMPORTANT NOTE!
In order for the datapack to work, you **must** install the `Infiniextras Resources` resourcepack! This resourcepack is attached in each version, and you must install both files from the **versions** list! If you simply click on *Download* on this page/the home page of the datapack, **it will only install the datapack without the required textures**!

---

A datapack that adds god items! This datapack is an addon to Infinicrafts. DM my discord `@error_dev` if you would like to see any cursed items that don't fit the main datapack to be added! This datapack will definitely be updated.

For a full list of features, please refer to the wiki (linked on sidebar).

<details>
<summary>Added Features (SPOILERS)</summary>
This datapack adds a new block called the God Core, which is used to craft the three god items: God Stick (basically a super OP sword that yeets entities), God Armor (a chestpiece that makes you immortal!), and a God Multitool (a multitool that instantly breaks anything!)

It also adds a new achievement, which I'll let you find out for yourself!
</details>
